title: Armor Reducer 3000
description: Resource Pack that minimizes armor visuals to better showcase both your own and others' player skins
body:
This resource pack greatly reduces the visual coverage of **all armor** while maintaining their _vanilla_ design, allowing your own character's skin and the skins of other players to be much more _clearly visible_ during whatever gameplay you'll have.
Didn't change trims yet, or item textures.

![Preview of all armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f3e21249635fef74b753d2e0a96e5f202e4cf2d.png)
